Selected work

Product & AI portfolio

I lead technical products from ambiguous user problems through product direction, stakeholder alignment, hands-on prototyping, and delivery. The case studies below are intentionally sanitised where the underlying work is sensitive.

Analyst contextSpecialist agentsActionable outputs

Product lead · Agentic AI · Threat hunting

Agentic AI for Threat Hunting

A multi-agent product that helps analysts move from raw operational context to structured analysis, hypotheses, and detection ideas.

Problem
Planning complex hunts could take analysts days.
My role
Defined product direction, architected the workflow, led the engineering team, and aligned senior stakeholders.
Outcome
Reduced planning time from days to hours and secured executive support for continued R&D.

Key product decisions

  • Decomposed an expert workflow into specialised agent responsibilities.
  • Designed outputs around analyst decisions rather than model novelty.
  • Balanced automation with traceable, reviewable intermediate reasoning.
  • Product strategy
  • Multi-agent systems
  • LLM evaluation
  • Team leadership

Analytics lead · Cloud security

Cloud Anomaly Analytics

Custom analytics for AWS and Microsoft 365 environments where commercial tooling left important visibility gaps.

My role
Led the team, shaped the analytics roadmap, and guided technical implementation.
Approach
Combined heuristic, data-driven, and LLM-assisted methods with dashboards and automated reporting.
Value
Improved real-time monitoring and made emerging patterns easier for analysts to investigate.
  • AWS
  • Microsoft 365
  • Anomaly detection
  • Security analytics

Data science · Trust and safety

Fraud & Risk Detection

A deployed machine-learning model and operational alerting system for a consumer social platform.

Problem
Manual profile review was slow and difficult to scale.
Delivery
Built the risk model, automated alerts for more than 20 business metrics, and analysed A/B experiments.
Outcome
Reduced manual profile-review effort by 70% while supporting product trust and safety.
  • Machine learning
  • Experimentation
  • Product analytics
  • Monitoring

Data science · E-commerce

Multilingual Product NLP

NLP models that predicted structured product attributes from marketplace titles and descriptions.

My role
Trained and evaluated classification models for production-oriented product data.
Complexity
Extended the capability across English, Chinese, Thai, Indonesian, and Vietnamese.
Value
Enabled automated attribute prediction across a broader range of marketplace listings.
  • NLP
  • Model evaluation
  • Multilingual data
  • Python
Career
